headline: 4 Utility Industry Stocks to Add as Power Demand Continues to Increase
summary: Amid rising electricity demand and higher unit prices, utilities like FE, NI, NWE and OTTR are well-positioned to benefit, supported by their strong customer base and well-chalked capital expenditure plans.

headline: Assessing NiSource (NI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Modest Undervaluation Signals
summary: NiSource (NI) has drawn fresh attention after recent price moves, with the stock showing mixed short term returns alongside stronger performance over the past month and the past three months. This has prompted investors to reassess this regulated utility. See our latest analysis for NiSource. Viewed over a longer stretch, NiSource’s recent 6.13% 1 month and 10.09% 3 month share price returns sit alongside a 13.33% year to date share price gain and a 1 year total shareholder return of 28.83%...
